title: Shortlist
tagline: Pick a few favorites and get a movie mix built around your taste
summary: Pick one to five movies you already love and Shortlist builds a fresh set of recommendations from the overlap in your taste. I trained the retrieval model, built the Go API, and shipped the full product.
outcome: The retriever reached 0.229 recall@100 against 0.127 for popularity while searching a catalog of 87,585 movies.
role: Built the retrieval model, Go serving system, and web app myself
proofPoints: 0.229 recall@100 versus 0.127 for popularity on the same held-out data
Exact retrieval across 87,585 movies with a 4.3 ms local median for known viewers
A live taste builder that blends up to five favorites without requiring an account
